meta.title: Petal Studio · Websites for small businesses
meta.description: Modern, fast, hand-built websites for small businesses in SK & CZ. Done in 14 days, fixed price, no monthly traps.
announcement.text: Booking 2 new projects this month. Reserve a slot
hero.label: Petal Studio · Bratislava & Prague
hero.sub: Hand-built, fast, modern websites for salons, cafés, clinics, photographers, florists and the kind of business you can call by name. Done in 14 days. Fixed price. No monthly traps.
intro.label: What I do
intro.title: Websites for people who'd rather not deal with the tech
intro.text: You tell me what you do and who your clients are. I build the website that brings you bookings, emails and calls — without you needing to learn what hosting or an SSL cert means.
stats.label3: languages out of the box (EN · SK · CS)
about_teaser.label: About
about_teaser.title: Hi, I'm the person who'll build your website.
about_teaser.p1: I'm a designer-developer with a real-world marketing background. I spent two years at Kofio running marketing, social-media content, ad campaigns, business analytics, team management and AI workflows — so I don't just build pretty pages, I build the kind of website that actually moves the numbers a small business cares about.
about_teaser.p2: Petal Studio is the next chapter: hand-built websites, monthly check-ups, and a real human at the other end of the email. No agency theatre.
services.label: Services
services.title: Turnkey websites. No surprises.
services.lead: Six things I really help with. Pick what you need — or let me decide what makes most sense.
services.s1.title: Design + dev + launch
services.s1.text: From the first call to a live domain. I handle everything — you control the content.
services.s2.title: Modernizing an old site
services.s2.text: Your 2015 website is holding you back. New build, kept URLs, no Google ranking lost.
services.s3.title: Found by locals
services.s3.text: Google Maps, schema.org, local keywords like "hairdresser old town Bratislava".
services.s4.title: Clients book themselves
services.s4.text: Reservio, Booksy, SimplyBook or a custom Tally form. Zero work for you.
services.s5.title: Monthly check-ups
services.s5.text: €25/month or pay-per-hour (€20/h). Updates, edits, security checks. Cancel anytime.
services.s6.title: EN + SK + CS switcher
services.s6.text: Just like this website. Perfect for businesses serving international clients.
portfolio.label: Work
portfolio.title: Six template archetypes for six different industries
portfolio.lead: These are demos for the most-asked-for business types. We pick one as a base and customize it for you — saves 60–70% of the typical website cost.
portfolio.p1.title: Lumi
portfolio.p1.text: Classic salon site — gallery, price list, online booking, floating WhatsApp button.
portfolio.p2.title: Luna
portfolio.p2.text: For cafés that also live on Instagram. Menu, opening hours, brunch card and photos.
portfolio.p3.title: Mend
portfolio.p3.text: Private physio clinics. Conditions, therapies, online booking, therapist profile.
portfolio.p4.title: Rove
portfolio.p4.text: Editorial site for a wedding / portrait photographer. Big galleries, packages, brief form.
portfolio.p5.title: Stem
portfolio.p5.text: Boutique florist with seasonal collections, same-day delivery, weddings & events.
portfolio.p6.title: Aria
portfolio.p6.text: Movement studio with class schedule, teachers, drop-in pricing & intro week offer.
process.label: Process
process.title: Simple. Predictable. On time.
process.step1.title: Free 20-min call
process.step1.text: I learn what you do, who your clients are, what the site has to achieve. No sales pitch.
process.step2.title: Proposal & quote
process.step2.text: Concrete offer with a fixed price and the template archetype I propose as a starting point.
process.step3.title: Materials
process.step3.text: Texts and photos. I can write the texts, source photos from Unsplash, or arrange a photographer.
process.step4.title: Build
process.step4.text: I send a preview link. You send feedback. 1–2 rounds of revisions are included.
process.step5.title: Launch
process.step5.text: Domain hooked up (or bought for you). Maps, schema, Search Console. Site goes live.
process.step6.title: Monthly check-up (optional)
process.step6.text: €25/month: small edits, security updates, performance reports, plus on-call WhatsApp support.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent packages, no asterisks
pricing.lead: Fixed prices, not hours. You always know what you'll pay. Prices are pre-VAT (sole trader, not yet VAT-registered).
pricing.tiers.start.title: Start
pricing.tiers.profi.title: Pro
pricing.tiers.plus.title: Plus
pricing.addons: Plus one-off: .sk/.cz domain ~€15/year · hosting €0–6/month depending on site type · monthly care plan from €25.
testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.t1.quote: Half the price of the other quotes and looks better than my competitors. Three months in, we get 30% more phone calls.
testimonials.t2.quote: Finally someone who understands I don't need 15 pages — I need one that works. Done in 12 days, fixed price.
testimonials.t3.quote: We had an old WordPress nobody could maintain. Migration with zero downtime, new look, faster site. Highly recommend.
testimonials.t4.quote: As a photographer I needed a portfolio that breathes. This is exactly that. Thanks for the patience through 8 versions of the gallery.
testimonials.t5.quote: After the first month our reservations went up 40%. The site works while I sleep — exactly what's promised here.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: You often ask
faq.q1: I already have a domain and an old website. Can you do something with that?
faq.a1: Yes. Either I migrate the domain to a new website, or I redesign on your existing host. Depends on the tech — usually I can migrate without any downtime.
faq.q2: What photos do you use if I don't have any?
faq.a2: For the first version I use styled photos from Unsplash (legal, free). We replace them with yours later. On higher tiers I can arrange a photographer at a fair price.
faq.q3: Will I be able to make edits myself?
faq.a3: On Pro and Plus tiers — yes. I set it up so editing texts, prices or gallery is doable in a simple interface. Or write me and I'll handle it under the monthly care plan.
faq.q4: What if I don't like the result?
faq.a4: Before we start I send a clear offer with references. After the first preview you have 1–2 included revision rounds. If we really miss the mark, I refund 50% of the deposit and we part on good terms.
faq.q5: Do you also work for businesses outside the templates shown here?
faq.a5: Absolutely. The 6 templates are demos for the most common asks (salons, cafés, clinics, photographers, florists, yoga studios) but I've also built sites for tutors, mechanics, bakeries, real estate agents, B&Bs and wedding planners. The templates are starting points, not limitations.
faq.a6: €25/month. I do small content edits (new prices, photos, opening hours), keep things up to date, monitor uptime, run a monthly performance report and stay on WhatsApp for quick questions. Cancel any time.
cta_band.title: Got an idea? Let's talk.
cta_band.text: Free 20-minute call via Google Meet or phone. No commitment, no pressure.
footer.tagline: Hand-built websites for small businesses in Slovakia and the Czech Republic. Done in 14 days.
footer.newsletter_text: One email a month, one practical tip to improve your website or local visibility. No spam.
cookies.text: This site uses cookies to improve your experience and gather anonymous stats.
intro_offer.label: Special offer
intro_offer.title: First consultation free
intro_offer.text: A 20-minute call where we figure out what your website needs to do. No commitment, no pressure, no "limited time offer" theatre.
